title: Secure delivery partner + steward; final expert sign-off of all shipped courses; confirm license/provenance
context: The project is not 'shipped' on merge — it is shipped when a real cohort of learners completes a course and a measurable reduction in targeted misconceptions is recorded. Securing a delivery partner (educator, patient-advocacy organisation, public library, or OER host) and a named steward is the M6 gate. The dated partner plan requires a named partner by 2026-10-31; if none is secured by 2027-01-31, the project applies the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule (donate to an OER host with measured reuse, or mothball). This task also confirms final expert sign-off of all shipped courses and verifies license/provenance completeness. No partner is yet secured (verifiedNeed: false).
objective: Secure a named delivery partner (educator/advocacy org/library/OER host) and steward for the courses; obtain final expert sign-off (biostatistician on all content, oncologist + patient-advocate on HIGH-tier content) confirming all shipped versions; and verify that every statistical assertion in all shipped courses has a current, CC-BY-compatible provenance register entry. If no partner is secured, document the pivot (OER host donation) or mothball decision per the dated plan.
acceptanceCriteria: A named delivery partner (educator, patient-advocacy organisation, public library, or OER host) and steward are secured, with verifiedNeed flipping to true; partner and steward are recorded with contact and consent

Final biostatistician/epidemiologist sign-off recorded for all three courses (version-scoped); final oncologist and patient-advocate sign-off recorded for Reading Survival and Reading Screening Evidence (version-scoped)
All statistical assertions across all shipped courses have current, CC-BY-compatible provenance register entries with data vintage; no entry past its reviewBy date at time of ship
License/provenance completeness confirmed: zero embedded sources with ccByCompatible: false; every dataset/figure has a register entry
If no delivery partner is secured by 2027-01-31, a governance-recorded decision documents the pivot to an OER host (with measured reuse outcomes) or a mothball to maintenance-only
Oncologist sign-off confirming HIGH-tier framing is upheld across all patient-facing content in the shipped versions
output: A partner-adoption and final-sign-off report: named delivery partner and steward secured (or pivot/mothball decision recorded), all expert sign-offs confirmed version-scoped, license/provenance completeness verified — the gate that unlocks the closed-loop delivery measurement.
